hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$file" in *.ts) if [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/.bin/eslint" ]; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/.bin/eslint" --fix "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi ;; esac; echo '{}'
